notes: cargo-mutants 27.0.0 has no --output json flag; --output/-o creates a mutants.out directory. The expected path mutants-titania-core.json was populated from the on-disk outcomes.json produced inside that directory.

--check runs `cargo check --tests --verbose`, not `cargo test`. killed (caught) = 0 and surviving = success = 236 reflect that the mutation broke the build for 244 mutants (unviable) and left the build green for 236 mutants. Survivors here are BUILD-survivors, not TEST-survivors; a follow-up `cargo mutants` (default, no --check) would need to be run to get test-based kill counts.
missed=0, caught=0, timeout=0 — no test failures were observed because cargo check does not run tests.
